description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions CI workflow that runs on pushes to master and tags, and on pull requests to master. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to test on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-12), Python versions (3.8-3.12), and architectures (x64, x86 on Windows). For each job, check out the code, set up Python, install dependencies, build Cython extensions, create a source distribution or wheel, and run tests with coverage on Ubuntu with Python 3.11. Additionally, build platform-specific installers (DMG on macOS, .exe on Windows), upload artifacts, and release to PyPI on tagged commits.
